# Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko — Orthopedic Surgeon in Israel

> Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko is an orthopedic specialist and shoulder & knee
> surgeon with 37 years of experience, seeing patients at four clinics in
> Bnei Ayish, Rehovot and Rishon LeZion, Israel (Maccabi Health Fund
> arrangement). The site is trilingual: Hebrew (default), English and Russian.

He is licensed by the Israel Ministry of Health (license No. 35902) and holds
a specialist certificate in orthopedic surgery (No. 1-27726). Treatment areas
include shoulder & elbow, knee, ankle & foot, joint injections (PRP,
hyaluronic acid, Orthokine, steroid) and arthroscopic surgery.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://dr-dubenko.co.il/en): overview of the practice and how to book a visit
- [About Dr. Dubenko](https://dr-dubenko.co.il/en/about): biography, experience and approach
- [Licenses & Certificates](https://dr-dubenko.co.il/en/about/credentials): Ministry of Health license No. 35902, specialist certificate No. 1-27726
- [Contact](https://dr-dubenko.co.il/en/contact): the four clinic locations, addresses and phone numbers
- [Book an Appointment](https://dr-dubenko.co.il/en/appointment): online appointment request

## Services

- [All services](https://dr-dubenko.co.il/en/services): overview of treatment areas
- [Shoulder & Elbow](https://dr-dubenko.co.il/en/services/shoulder-elbow): diagnosis and treatment of shoulder and elbow pain and injuries
- [Knee](https://dr-dubenko.co.il/en/services/knee): from meniscus and ligament injuries to advanced knee surgery
- [Ankle & Foot](https://dr-dubenko.co.il/en/services/ankle-foot): care for sprains, instability and injuries of the ankle and foot
- [Joint Injections](https://dr-dubenko.co.il/en/services/joint-injections): PRP, hyaluronic acid, Orthokine and steroid injections as alternatives to surgery
- [Arthroscopic Surgery](https://dr-dubenko.co.il/en/services/arthroscopic-surgery): minimally invasive joint surgery with faster recovery
- [Sports Orthopedics](https://dr-dubenko.co.il/en/sports-orthopedics): treatment of sports injuries and return-to-sport care

## Patient information

- [FAQ](https://dr-dubenko.co.il/en/patient-info/faq): answers to common questions about visits, treatments and surgery
- [Testimonials](https://dr-dubenko.co.il/en/patient-info/testimonials): what patients say about their treatment and recovery
- [Articles & Guides](https://dr-dubenko.co.il/en/patient-info/articles): practical guides on injury prevention and rehabilitation

## Other languages

- [Hebrew (default)](https://dr-dubenko.co.il/): עברית — the primary version of the site
- [English](https://dr-dubenko.co.il/en)
- [Russian](https://dr-dubenko.co.il/ru): русская версия сайта
